svg.title: Bajaj Finance Chatbot — system architecture
svg.desc: Flow showing browser, FastAPI, memory store, LLM, tool loop, and bajaj_db.json

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the frontend send messages to FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('What does FastAPI do in this chatbot?')
g.text: Receives request · creates session_id · calls run_chat_turn()

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through the run_chat_turn function step by step')
sendPrompt('How does the tool execution loop work in session 8?')
sendPrompt('What does the ChatResponse look like?')
